agent_notes: Read-only public feed. Pricing is free for these public files. Authentication is none. No account required and no API key or credentials are needed to read the public files. This feed records ledger events and does not recount referenced status artifacts, prior third-party readbacks, prior archives, discovery receipts, search ranking proof, referring-domain proof, shipping proof, pricing proof, inventory proof, or private commerce data.
description: A compact no-auth Packrift authority changelog feed with RSS, Atom, JSON Feed, ActivityStream, verification policy, and count boundaries.

endpoints.response_description: Public JSON stats for latest authority totals and count treatment.
JSONL rows for recent Packrift authority ledger updates.

endpoints.description: Fetch the public RSS feed of recent Packrift authority updates.
endpoints.response_description: RSS feed for recent Packrift authority updates.

name: Packrift Authority Changelog Feed
